title: EventFlow Platform Performance
description: Dashboard for monitoring EventFlow Go Ingestion, Gateway, Kafka topic states, and PostgreSQL analytics health.

panels.title: Event Ingestion Rate (events/sec)
panels.description: Real-time ingestion rate from the Go Ingestion service metrics.

panels.title: Ingestion Share by Project
panels.description: Total events processed split by Project ID.

panels.title: Kafka Consumer Lag (analytics-service)
panels.description: Number of unconsumed events in the raw-events topic.

panels.title: Total Events Saved (Postgres)
panels.description: Cumulative events stored in the analytics database.

queries.query: SELECT count(*) as total_events FROM events
